allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const content = fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/next/dist/server/dev/hot-reloader-turbopack.js', 'utf8'\); const matches = [...content.matchAll\(/[\\"']\(middleware|proxy\)[\\"']/g\)]; matches.forEach\(m => { const start = Math.max\(0, m.index-100\); console.log\(content.slice\(start, m.index+200\)\); console.log\('---'\); }\)")
